name: I have tinnitus too from work noise, does that count?

mainEntity.name: I have tinnitus too from work noise, does that count?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, tinnitus from noise exposure qualifies alongside hearing loss for comp benefits.[4] Context: Often paired in NIHL claims; medical evidence links both.[4] Key factors: Consistent symptoms with noise pattern, expert diagnosis.[1][4] Practical guidance: Include in claim filing, get full eval; attorney maximizes award.[7] Covered for treatment.
